headline: Citizens launches transportation coverage, names FedEx a top large-cap pick
summary: Investing.com -- Citizens initiated coverage of the Transportation, Logistics & Services group with twenty-two names, naming FedEx among its top large-cap picks alongside FTAI Aviation, Union Pacific and C.H. Robinson, according to a note from analyst Jeff Kauffman.

headline: Benchmark Maintains Buy on Union Pacific, Raises Price Target to $325
summary: Benchmark  analyst Nathan P. Martin   maintains Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP) with a Buy and raises the price target from $300 to $325.

headline: Citizens Initiates Coverage On Union Pacific with Market Outperform Rating, Announces Price Target of $350
summary: Citizens  analyst Jeff Kauffman   initiates coverage on Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP) with a Market Outperform rating and announces Price Target of $350.
